zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Lacy於1223年1月25日出生在英國林可爾史爾林肯時，她的父親Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln32歲，母親Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln17歲。她於1238年2月2日與Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1289年3月10日在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Lacy于1223年1月25日出生在英国林可爾史爾林肯时，她的父亲Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln32岁，母亲Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln17岁。她于1238年2月2日与Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1289年3月10日在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Lacy was born on 25 January 1223, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, was 32 and her mother, Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, was 17. She married Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester on 2 February 1238. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 March 1289, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Lacy est née le 25 janvier 1223, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester le 2 février 1238. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1289, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Lacy am 25. Januar 1223 in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln 17. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1238 Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1289 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lacy è nata il il 25 gennaio 1223 nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester il 2 febbraio 1238. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1289, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Lacyが1223年1月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincolnは32歳，母Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincolnは17歳であった。1238年2月2日にRichard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1289年3月10日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Lacy(이)가 1223년 1월 25일 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1238년 2월 2일 Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1289년 3월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.25 January 1223–10 March 1289: 25 de janeiro de 1223–10 de março de 1289
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Lacy nasceu em 25 de janeiro de 1223, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester em 2 de fevereiro de 1238. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1289, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Lacy родилась 25 января 1223 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester 2 февраля 1238 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 марта 1289 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.25 January 1223–10 March 1289: 25 de enero de 1223–10 de marzo de 1289
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Lacy nació el 25 de enero de 1223, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret de Quincy , Countess of Lincoln, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Richard de Clare 6th Earl of Gloucester el 2 de febrero de 1238. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1289, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
